prerequisites: Install and connect the official OpenAI Gmail plugin separately.
Run in ChatGPT Work on web or desktop.

synthetic_fixture.setup: Before reviewer testing, seed the connected test mailbox with these messages and replace every example address in prompts with the corresponding controlled test address.
messages: ROSSI-DIRECT-IN: Rossi primary to studio, subject Rateazione INPS Rossi, body with one distinctive harmless test fact.
ROSSI-DIRECT-OUT: studio to Rossi primary, subject Documenti Rossi 2026.
ROSSI-PEC: Rossi PEC to studio, subject Comunicazione PEC Rossi.
MIXED-CLIENT: Rossi primary to studio with Bianchi primary in Cc.
THIRD-PARTY: third party to studio, subject Rossi parere, with no Rossi address in returned participants.

positive_cases.prompt: Vera, cerca in Gmail le email recenti di Rossi. L'indirizzo confermato è amministrazione@rossi.it.
Vera, cerca in Gmail le email di Rossi SRL sulla rateazione INPS.
Vera, per Rossi usa gli indirizzi amministrazione@rossi.it e pec@pec.rossi.it e cerca le email del 2026.
Vera, nel thread con Rossi includi soltanto i singoli messaggi che superano il controllo degli indirizzi.
Paolo, cerca nel tuo Gmail collegato le email di Bianchi usando contabilita@bianchi.it.

negative_cases.prompt: Vera, cerca le email di Rossi.
negative_cases.condition: The Gmail read tools are unavailable or the wrong account is connected.
negative_cases.expected: Stop and ask the user to install, enable, reconnect, or select the official Gmail plugin; do not use local tools, IMAP, or browser scraping.
negative_cases.why: Vera cannot inspect the requested mailbox without the separately connected Gmail read tools.

negative_cases.prompt: Vera, separa tutta la posta di tutti i clienti dello studio.
negative_cases.expected: Do not scan all clients. Ask the user to select exactly one client.
negative_cases.why: The first Marketplace version deliberately supports one selected client per run to avoid cross-client mixing.

negative_cases.prompt: Vera, usa anche i messaggi con destinatari mancanti o con Rossi e Bianchi insieme.
negative_cases.expected: Exclude incomplete, malformed, or mixed-client messages from the automatic client answer.
negative_cases.why: Missing returned participants and visible multi-client participation cannot support automatic client routing.
